# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for service mesh security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: low-latency-services
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service-netpol
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      sidecar-bypass: "true"
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: low-latency-services
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: allowed-caller
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8443
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: low-latency-services
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8443
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: kube-system
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service-sa
  namespace: low-latency-services
  annotations:
    description: "Dedicated service account for low-latency services bypassing Istio sidecar"
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-trading-engine
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: trading-engine
    component: low-latency
    sidecar-bypass: "true"
  annotations:
    description: "Trading engine requiring direct network access for minimal latency"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: trading-engine
      sidecar-bypass: "true"
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: trading-engine
        component: low-latency
        sidecar-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: low-latency-service-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10001
        runAsGroup: 10001
        fsGroup: 10001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: trading-engine
          image: registry.internal.example.com/trading-engine:1.4.2@sha256:abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: TLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: TLS_CERT_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/tls.crt"
            - name: TLS_KEY_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/tls.key"
            - name: MTLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: MTLS_CA_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/ca.crt"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "2000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tls-certs
              mountPath: /etc/tls
              readOnly: true
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8443
              scheme: HTTPS
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8443
              scheme: HTTPS
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
      volumes:
        - name: tls-certs
          secret:
            secretName: trading-engine-tls
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            medium: Memory
            sizeLimit: "64Mi"
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: trading-engine
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-market-data-feed
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: market-data-feed
    component: low-latency
    sidecar-bypass: "true"
  annotations:
    description: "Market data feed service requiring direct network access for real-time data streaming"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: market-data-feed
      sidecar-bypass: "true"
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: market-data-feed
        component: low-latency
        sidecar-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: low-latency-service-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10002
        runAsGroup: 10002
        fsGroup: 10002
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: market-data-feed
          image: registry.internal.example.com/market-data-feed:2.1.0@sha256:fedcba0987654321fedcba0987654321fedcba0987654321fedcba0987654321
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: TLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: TLS_CERT_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/tls.crt"
            - name: TLS_KEY_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/tls.key"
            - name: MTLS_ENABLED
              value: "true"
            - name: MTLS_CA_PATH
              value: "/etc/tls/ca.crt"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tls-certs
              mountPath: /etc/tls
              readOnly: true
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8443
              scheme: HTTPS
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8443
              scheme: HTTPS
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
            failureThreshold: 3
      volumes:
        - name: tls-certs
          secret:
            secretName: market-data-feed-tls
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            medium: Memory
            sizeLimit: "64Mi"
      topologySpreadConstraints:
        - maxSkew: 1
          topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
          whenUnsatisfiable: DoNotSchedule
          labelSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: market-data-feed
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: trading-engine
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: trading-engine
spec:
  selector:
    app: trading-engine
  ports:
    - name: https
      port: 8443
      targetPort: 8443
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: market-data-feed
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: market-data-feed
spec:
  selector:
    app: market-data-feed
  ports:
    - name: https
      port: 8443
      targetPort: 8443
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: low-latency-services-strict-mtls
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      sidecar-bypass: "true"
  portLevelMtls:
    8443:
      mode: PERMISSIVE
